cards.flavor_text: [i]This sucker uses raw demonic power to do little space-time jumps. It'll warp right next to you and bite your face off before you can blink! Hope you got quick reflexes.[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]They don't walk — they teleport, and they'll hang back from a fight only to jump in while you're dealing with something else.[/i]

cards.rules_text: When this creature dies, it deals damage to each creature equal to its toughness.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Watch out! Take these guys out at range and they'll blast their allies, but let them get close and you're in for a world of hurt.[/i]

{2}{B}, sacrifice a creature: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the sacrificed creature's mana value.

Enchanted creature gets +2/+2, has first strike, and is goaded.
When this creature attacks and isn't blocked, you may attach it bestowed to target creature defending player controls.

[i]Overcommit — [/i]Whenever a creature deals damage to you, goad it until the end of its controller's next turn.
[i]Reposition — [/i]Sacrifice this enchantment during the declare blockers step: Choose an attacking creature. For any number of creatures the defending player controls, that creature either blocks it or stops blocking it. [i](The new blocks don't have to be legal. If you remove all blockers from a blocked creature, it's still “blocked.”)[/i]

[i]Swords Formation — [/i]Equipped creature has double strike, menace, and “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.”

cards.flavor_text: [i]“The demonic power was activated in me once, when Vergil lovingly jammed this through my chest.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: [i]Duelist — [/i]Whenever a creature you control attacks a player, if no other creature is attacking that player, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it can't be blocked by nonlegendary creatures until end of turn.
